serious athletes and adventurers who want to do more, not wear more – fēnix 5s is the perfect fit. it’s our premium multisport watch that offers full-size performance in a lighter, sleeker, more effectiveness of your workout. it’s one smart sport watch you can comfortably wear anywhere – office or outback – to keep pace with your active lifestyle.striking design, strong performanceathletes and adventurers come in all sizes. that’s why the fēnix 5 series offers multiple models that vary in size to fit every wrist and every workout. each version offers a variety of stainless steel finishes, quickfit™ watch band combinations and premium feature sets to give you the look, performance and lightweight comfort to match both your aesthetic and athletic interests.dual navigation networksevery fēnix 5 series watch features advanced gps and glonass satellite reception to track in more challenging environments than gps alone. you can count on long battery life in each mode of operation (varies by model, depending on settings). and for go-anywhere confidence, all fēnix 5 versions are water-rated to 100 meters.outstanding readability on the runa bright, high-resolution, style with interchangeable watchbandsa selection of quickfit bands in your choice of premium leather, metal or silicone makes it easy to mix and match styles to go with any sport or activity. no tools are required to make the transformation. just swap, click and go.advanced performance metricsevery fēnix 5s watch is packed with sophisticated training features to help monitor your form and performance³. enhanced readouts for training status and training effect show aerobic and anaerobic benefits of your workout – so you can see how your workouts are paying off and even compare results with your peers.the vo2 max estimator crunches data, including your running speed, beats per minute and heart rate variability, to estimate the maximum volume of oxygen you can consume per minute.and other fitness metrics include recovery advisor with a recovery timer and recovery check, plus a race predictor that estimates your ideal finish time based on your current vo2 max number.advanced running dynamicsnow you can go further with your running data. garmin training features that tap into extended physiological metrics and advanced running dynamics¹ can help improve your form and overall performance. these include:performance condition: after running for 6-20 minutes, fēnix 5s compares your real-time condition to your average fitness levelslactate threshold: through analysis of your pace and heart rate, fēnix 5s estimates the point where your muscles start to rapidly fatiguecadence — number of steps per minutestride length — shows your stride length in real timewant more? by pairing your watch with a compatible heart rate chest strap such as the hrm-run™, you can access these additional fēnix 5s metrics³:vertical oscillation and ratio — the degree of 'bounce' in your running motion and the benefit ratio to stride lengthground contact time and balance — shows how much time, in the running motion, your foot is on the ground rather than in flight and lets you check your running symmetrystress score: fēnix 5s measures your heart rate variability while standing still, for 3 minutes, to provide you with an estimated stress level. the scale of this is 1 to 100; low scores indicate lower stress levelsswim profiles, skiing, paddle sports, golf and morebeyond their running functions, fenix 5 watches also offer special feature sets to help with swim training, skiing, golfing and paddle sports, including stand-up paddle boarding and rowing.for swimmers, the device tracks your distance, pace, stroke count and more. ski/board mode puts speed, distance, vertical drop and an automatic run counter (with auto pause for the lift line) and more at your fingertips.the feature set for paddle sports includes stroke count, stroke rate and even distance per stroke. golf mode gives you yardage to the front, back and middle of the green for any single course you’ve downloaded from garmin connect – and also adds enhancements such as stat tracking (fairways hit, etc.), green view, autoshot detection and auto measure.navigate the great outdoors, your wayeach model in the fēnix 5 series provides comprehensive navigation and tracking to guide you on and off can be used to predict weather changes by showing short-term trends in air pressure.the 3-axis electronic compass keeps your bearing, whether you’re moving or not. in addition, there’s an internal gyroscope to help improve position accuracy (and battery life) in ultratrac mode – as well as a thermometer to help you monitor changing weather conditions.so many ways to stay connectedall fēnix 5 away from your desk. other connected features include automatic uploads to our garmin connect online fitness community, live tracking and social media sharing through our free garmin connect and garmin connect™ mobile applications.custom apps and watch facesyou can customize your fēnix 5s watch with free downloads from our connect iq store. change your watch face, add data fields or get apps and widgets for information at a glance.

distances, the lens delivers high rendering performance throughout the entire focusing range.hyper sonic motor ensures high af speedthe hsm (hyper sonic motor) ensures a silent, high-speed af crucial 4gb ddr3 pc3-12800 unbuffered non-ecc 1.35v204-pin sodimmddr3 204-pin sodimm: approximately 2.66 in. by 1.18 in. (66 mm by 30 mm)in short, 204-pin small outline dual inline memory modules (sodimms) are the form factor used to provide ddr3 memory modules for notebook computers and other small form factor computing platforms. 204-pin sodimms are currently available in pc3-8500 (ddr3 1066mhz) and pc3-10600 (ddr3 1333mhz) speeds.to use ddr3 memory, your system must have both a 204-pin sodimm slot and a chipset that supports ddr3 memory. a ddr3 sodimm will not fit into ddr2 or ddr memory sockets. (information about which memory technology your system uses is included in the crucial memory advisor™ tool.)sodimms are smaller and thinner than regular dimms, and the 204-pin sodimm pcbs are always ~2.6 inches long and are usually around 1.18 inches high (though the heights can vary slightly). they consist of a number of memory components (usually black) that are attached to a printed circuit board (usually green). the number of memory components on a 204-pin sodimm’s printed circuit board (pcb) can vary, but the pcb will always have 102 pins on the front and the back both, for a total of 204 pins. the gold pins on the bottom of the sodimm provide the connection between the memory module and the memory socket.specificationecc: non-eccform factor: sodimmmodule size: 4gbkit qty: 1speed: 1600 mt/stracer: falsevoltage: 1.35vdimm type: unbufferedbullet features: increases system performancewarranty: limited lifetimespecs: ddr3 pc3-12800 • cl=11 • unbuffered • non-ecc • ddr3-1600 • 1.35v

description: omega seamaster diver 300m 210.22.42.20.01.002 reviewthe omega seamaster diver seems to be the watch that will take the omega collections to greater limelight of luxurious timepieces. the omega seamaster diver celebrated its 30th anniversary in 2018. celebrations were marked by the release of more improved models of the watch. the omega seamaster diver 300m 210.22.42.20.01.002 is one of the upgraded versions of the model that has been released so far. the case of the omega seamaster diver 300m 210.22.42.20.01.002 has been increased by 1mm compared to its previous model. the model is encased in a 42 mm of the legendary omega sedna rose gold. this is combined with stainless steel which surrounds the black dial which is a laser-engraved wave. the case is water resistance up to 300 meters / 1000 feet (30bars). on the sides of the case, you will notice that the watch is equipped with scratch-resistant sapphire crystals.the anti-glare coated sapphire crystals are domed in shape. this is a very important feature for clearer legibility, due to the delicate coating the watch requires attention. the case looks very elegant with the satin-brushed finish. the thickness of the omega seamaster diver 300m 210.22.42.20.01.002 model is 13.5mm. the watch has a crown protector that is polished, and carefully tucked in between is a gold crown. another notable feature is the satin-brushed finish found on the sedna gold bezel, it creates a wonderful contrast to the glossy polish done on the ceramic. this model of omega seamaster diver watch has a bi-color concept. the concept has been smartly expressed by omega in several accents. all these accents have been created by the sedna™ gold (18k pink gold alloy) which is patented by omega. the alloy brings sportiness and more heat to the dial of the watch. in addition to that, the alloy has been used to fill the symbols which are located on the black ceramic bezel. the watch is manually controlled by the helium release valve located at the 10 o’clock sign. the helium release valve happens to be a signature feature of the omega seamaster diver 300m. however, there are some watches in the market which have the same water resistance level of 30 bars but don’t have the helium release valve. omega has maintained this feature in this model since it was present in the very first model of the omega seamaster diver 300m. the other additional feature of the helium release valve is that it can be opened and closed safely underwater.the dial has the legendary wave’s design which was seen in the original model but got lost in the previous updates of the model. the waves are a little different than the ones on the first model of omega seamaster diver. with this seamaster diver 300m model, the waves are laser engraved and are located on the polished ceramic dials. the dial has been made of polished ceramic and comes in a variety of colors: pvd chrome color, black or blue. at 6 o’clock you find the date aperture instead of 3 o’clock. the black date disc has a white print. close to the aperture you will find a smaller hour index. the lume color on the dial is pretty amazing. the hour indices are blue, the bezel is green, and so is the minute hand. the watch is powered by omega’s caliber 8800 internal movement. this is the very first-time omega is using an in house movement, all the previous models used the caliber 2500. the movement is certified as a master chronometer and very solid. the movement guarantees high accuracy ranging from +0 to +5 seconds daily. the timepiece comes both in rubbers tarps and steel bracelets. the ones with steel bracelets are more costly than the rubber strapped ones. the 210.22.42.20.01.002 model has rubbers straps. the rubber straps are much softer and supple compared to the previous rubber straps used by omega. instead of a folding buckle, omega included a normal buckle in this watch model. the buckle has an amazing finish and is signed omega. unlike the 1990s models’ rubber straps, these straps lack the double ridged feature. the watch has the following specifications:➢ stainless steel and sedna (18-carat rose gold) case.➢ the case has a diameter of
